name: Paramorfosi
detailed_description:
Update!

The game has been updated to Paramorfosi 1.1.3 DATE: 02/22/24 The game has been updated to Paramorfosi 1.08 DATE: 01/27/24


About the Game

"Embark on a chilling journey in Paramorfosi, a third-person exploration game immersed in horror atmospheres and perilous encounters. Your objective: locate four torches and a crucial artifact to expel a malevolent entity that has seized control of an entire town. Traverse through eerie landscapes, solving puzzles and securing essential items to evade fatal threats. As you unravel the mysteries, beware of the looming dangers that could lead to your demise. Delve further into the game's intrigue with Eevy's simulation room, an action-adventure mini-game accessible by clicking the PI symbol at the bottom right corner of the screen. Are you ready to face the unknown and unravel the secrets that shroud the town in darkness?" UPDATE 01/24/24 Added extra content: -new scenario -more enemies -more objectives -a simple inventory -limited lives -several fixes UPDATE 01/27/24 -fixed several gate dialog glitches

"Embark on a chilling journey in Paramorfosi, a third-person exploration game immersed in horror atmospheres and perilous encounters. Your objective: locate four torches and a crucial artifact to expel a malevolent entity that has seized control of an entire town. Traverse through eerie landscapes, solving puzzles and securing essential items to evade fatal threats. As you unravel the mysteries, beware of the looming dangers that could lead to your demise.

Delve further into the game's intrigue with Eevy's simulation room, an action-adventure mini-game accessible by clicking the PI symbol at the bottom right corner of the screen. Are you ready to face the unknown and unravel the secrets that shroud the town in darkness?"
